name: Kubernetes Events Deleted
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
SIGMA Title: Kubernetes Events Deleted
SIGMA Description: Detects when events are deleted in Kubernetes.
An adversary may delete Kubernetes events in an attempt to evade detection.


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%events%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Kubernetes Events Deleted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%events%' AQL filter query
